title: CUPPA JOY
subtitle: From the high mountains of Ethiopia and Brazil — the authentic Lebanese taste

story.p1: CUPPA JOY is our own roasted and ground coffee brand: premium beans from the highlands of Ethiopia and Brazil, blended with a touch of the magic of Lebanon.
story.p2: Every batch is roasted small at our own plant in Mkalles and packed fresh — the cup that carries our family name.

products.title: Every brew, every size
products.subtitle: Roasted and packed by the Arome Gourmet roasting plant — the finest coffees from the premier growing regions around the world.

items.name: Turkish
items.body: Finely ground for the pot — soft or vacuum bags, plus a plastic jar.

items.name: Espresso
items.body: Ground or whole bean, for the bar and the home machine alike.

items.name: American & Filter
items.body: American and filter coffee, roasted and packed to order.

items.name: Half-Ground Bulk
items.body: Special half-ground, multi-use coffee for high-volume service.

products.valve: All soft packaging includes a degassing valve to keep freshness and avoid oxidation.

cta.title: Enjoy the taste of CUPPA JOY
cta.body: Ask where to find CUPPA JOY near you, or talk to us about stocking it.
